locator_or_quantity: Tables 2–3 UNIFAC ΔT and Δy columns
reason_detail: Residuals are predictions/errors from a model, not measurements.
permitted_use: Audit model reproduction only.

locator_or_quantity: Wilson/NRTL/UNIQUAC parameters and calculated quantities
reason_detail: Parameters were regressed from the same VLE data.
permitted_use: Literature comparison only.

locator_or_quantity: Calculated activity coefficients, Antoine/NRTL/Wilson parameters, fitted excess-enthalpy expressions
reason_detail: Not independent experimental targets.
permitted_use: Literature comparison only.

locator_or_quantity: Transcribed T = 59.11 °C row
reason_detail: Value is OCR-suspect; it is retained verbatim but quarantined until exact PDF visual verification.
permitted_use: Source verification only.

locator_or_quantity: Calculated activity coefficients/correlation parameters
reason_detail: Derived from the measured Txy data.
permitted_use: Literature comparison only.

locator_or_quantity: Calculated vapor compositions/activities from static total-pressure measurements
reason_detail: Only total pressure is directly measured unless vapor is sampled.
permitted_use: Measured P–T–x rows only after primary extraction.

locator_or_quantity: DMSO-containing ternary rows
reason_detail: DMSO is outside the target system.
permitted_use: None; only a true binary edge may be eligible.

locator_or_quantity: Any fitted VLE correlation columns
reason_detail: Cannot serve as measurements.
permitted_use: None.

locator_or_quantity: pCO2 treated as direct sensor measurement
reason_detail: Source obtains pCO2 after solvent-vapor correction and gas composition measurement.
permitted_use: Use only as calibration-derived pCO2.

locator_or_quantity: GC and BaCO3 loading values treated as independent equilibrium rows
reason_detail: They are paired determinations at the same state.
permitted_use: Retain in one row or model their measurement covariance.

locator_or_quantity: Extended-UNIQUAC pCO2 columns; modeled speciation; modeled heat curves
reason_detail: Adjacent model outputs are not raw measurements.
permitted_use: None.

locator_or_quantity: High-pressure pCO2 reconstructed by subtracting modeled water/MEA vapor pressure
reason_detail: Tables 3–4 directly report total pressure only.
permitted_use: Use total pressure as the target.

locator_or_quantity: Flow-through pCO2 without demonstrated equilibrium
reason_detail: Slow CO2–MEA reaction can leave process measurements out of equilibrium.
permitted_use: None unless equilibration is proven.

locator_or_quantity: MEA and MEAH+ treated as separately observed
reason_detail: Fast proton exchange yields only a combined amine signal.
permitted_use: Compare only to model-predicted sum.

locator_or_quantity: 2-oxazolidone omitted from carbon/amine balance
reason_detail: The byproduct was observed and quantified.
permitted_use: Keep as separate species/measurement.

locator_or_quantity: Separate validation of MEA vs MEAH+ or HCO3− vs CO3^2−
reason_detail: NMR reports combined groups.
permitted_use: Aggregate model outputs before comparison.

locator_or_quantity: MEAH+, MEACOO−, and free MEA from balances treated as direct species measurements
reason_detail: These quantities are reconstructed from TIC/alkalinity/bicarbonate balances.
permitted_use: Use only with classification and circularity warning.

locator_or_quantity: CO3^2− silently included in bicarbonate
reason_detail: Carbonate was not independently measured.
permitted_use: Retain as unresolved/omitted according to source method.

locator_or_quantity: Spectroscopic PLS/calibration predictions without independent standards and covariance
reason_detail: Spectral-model outputs are not direct concentrations absent traceable calibration.
permitted_use: Qualitative mechanism or calibrated validation only.

locator_or_quantity: Fitted low-frequency dielectric limit treated as a directly measured DC point
reason_detail: εs comes from broadband model fitting and shares covariance with relaxation parameters.
permitted_use: Use only as fitted dispersion limit with covariance.

locator_or_quantity: Microwave ε′ at 915–2450 MHz relabeled as static ε0
reason_detail: Microwave response is frequency-dependent and may differ from the zero-frequency limit.
permitted_use: Use frequency-specific complex permittivity only.

locator_or_quantity: Thermodynamic pKa relabeled as direct MEAH+ activity coefficient
reason_detail: EMF/potentiometry constrain protonation equilibrium but do not isolate target-ion activity coefficients.
permitted_use: Use raw EMF or pKa with derivation.

locator_or_quantity: Any analog-salt mean activity/osmotic coefficient
reason_detail: Analog salts are not MEAH+/MEACOO− target-ion evidence.
permitted_use: At most qualitative prior; never direct qualification.

locator_or_quantity: NIST ThermoML rows treated as an independent experiment
reason_detail: ThermoML encodes the journal data; it is not a second dataset.
permitted_use: Machine-readable cross-check only.

locator_or_quantity: N2O solubility or N2O→CO2 analogy values labeled direct CO2 physical solubility
reason_detail: N2O is directly measured, while CO2 physical solubility may be inferred by analogy.
permitted_use: Use direct N2O to constrain a surrogate submodel; classify CO2 estimate as indirect.

locator_or_quantity: AMP- or MDEA-containing blend rows
reason_detail: Additional amines are outside the target species list.
permitted_use: Only exact pure-MEA edge rows, if present.

locator_or_quantity: Redlich–Kister coefficients and raw excess-enthalpy rows both used as independent targets
reason_detail: Fit coefficients encode the same raw calorimetry.
permitted_use: Use raw rows; coefficients only as a cross-check.

locator_or_quantity: MDEA-only heat-of-absorption source treated as MEA data
reason_detail: The cited DOI/title appears to concern MDEA, not MEA.
permitted_use: None unless primary source demonstrates MEA rows.

locator_or_quantity: Differential, semi-differential, integral, and solution enthalpies pooled without definitions
reason_detail: These heat quantities have different derivatives/reference states and may use opposite signs.
permitted_use: Retain each source definition and sign separately.

locator_or_quantity: HEIA, HEEDA, or 2-oxazolidone folded into total MEA
reason_detail: Degradation products have distinct mole-fraction columns and affect density/viscosity.
permitted_use: Keep each byproduct as a separate component.

locator_or_quantity: Unreported table cells interpolated
reason_detail: Dashes/missing cells are not measurements.
permitted_use: Leave blank.

locator_or_quantity: Water mole fraction calculated and stored without an explicit source formula
reason_detail: The audit preserves printed x2/x3/x4/x5 fields; no balance value is added.
permitted_use: Compute only in a separate, documented transformation layer.

locator_or_quantity: Process-monitoring pH
reason_detail: Equilibrium, pH scale, standards, ionic-strength handling, and uncertainty were not all demonstrated.
permitted_use: None for equilibrium model qualification.

locator_or_quantity: Digitized points from plots where model curves overlap measurements
reason_detail: Cannot prove whether a pixel represents a measurement or prediction.
permitted_use: Use only if authors provide raw data or symbols are unambiguous with error bounds.

locator_or_quantity: Abstract-only values
reason_detail: No table, basis, method, or uncertainty can be audited.
permitted_use: Discovery only.

locator_or_quantity: Review-only reproduced values
reason_detail: Rounding, rebasing, and transcription cannot be excluded.
permitted_use: Discovery only; trace to primary.

locator_or_quantity: Random row-level train/validation split within one apparatus campaign
reason_detail: Rows share stock solutions, calibration, apparatus, and sometimes fitted corrections.
permitted_use: Split by source, lab, apparatus, concentration, or campaign.
